'''Enacca''' was a brown-furred [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] who lived on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. An associate of [[Kal Skirata]], she was often put in charge of logistics for Skirata's black ops missions. Enacca transferred prisoners from [[Arca Company Barracks]] to a safe house she secured during [[Omega Squad]] and [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad's]] mission to Coruscant in the second year of the Clone Wars. She also provided transportation and rounded up speeders that had to be abandoned during the course of the mission.

Shortly before the [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Battle of Kashyyyk]] she accompanied General [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] and [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]] to [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] to liberate her home world and keep an eye on Etain for Skirata. After [[Sev/Legends|Sev]] was lost in battle Enacca forcibly removed Etain from the Kashyyyk and took her back to Coruscant to rendezvous with the Skirata Clan before they departed for [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]]. She was one of the last to see Etain alive before the Jedi was killed in the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]].
